# Post-Incident Review Template

```markdown
# Post-Incident Review: [incident name]

## Summary

## Customer and business impact

## Timeline quality
- Complete timeline: [yes/no]
- Missing evidence:

## Response assessment
- Detection:
- Triage:
- Communication:
- Mitigation:
- Verification:

## Technical assessment
- Root cause status:
- Contributing factors:
- Gaps in tests:
- Gaps in observability:
- Gaps in runbooks:

## Action items
| ID | Action | Owner | Target date | Evidence required |
|---|---|---|---|---|

## Downstream work
- PR prompts needed:
- Verification needed:
- Docs/runbooks needed:
- Release/deploy follow-up:
```
